parameters.inputSchema:
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "title": "JobExtraction",
  "type": "object",
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "properties": {
    "JobNumber": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "string", "pattern": "^[0-9]{5}$" }, { "type": "null" } ] },
    "Address": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 }, { "type": "null" } ] },
    "AddressLine1": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 }, { "type": "null" } ] },
    "Postcode": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "string", "pattern": "^(GIR ?0AA|(?:(?:[A-PR-UWYZ][0-9][0-9]?|[A-PR-UWYZ][A-HK-Y][0-9][0-9]?|[A-PR-UWYZ][0-9][A-HJKSTUW]?|[A-PR-UWYZ][A-HK-Y][0-9][ABEHMNPRV-Y])) ?[0-9][ABD-HJLNP-UW-Z]{2})$" }, { "type": "null" } ] },
    "ContactForAccess": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 }, { "type": "null" } ] },
    "Description": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 }, { "type": "null" } ] },
    "Tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string", "enum": ["Electrical", "EICR", "Plumbing", "Glazing", "Building", "Gas", "Decorating"] }, "uniqueItems": true },
    "Importance": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "string", "enum": ["Low", "Medium", "High"] }, { "type": "null" } ] },
    "Action": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string", "enum": ["Quote", "Todo", "Proceed"] }, "uniqueItems": true },
    "ThreadSummary": { "anyOf": [ { "type": "string", "minLength": 1 }, { "type": "null" } ] },
    "confidence": { "type": "number", "minimum": 0, "maximum": 1 },
    "evidence": {
      "type": "object",
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "JobNumber": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
        "Address": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
        "AddressLine1": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
        "Postcode": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
        "ContactForAccess": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
        "Description": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
        "Tags": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string", "enum": ["Electrical", "EICR", "Plumbing", "Glazing", "Building", "Gas"] }, "uniqueItems": true },
        "Importance": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
        "Action": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "string", "enum": ["Quote", "Todo", "Proceed"] }, "uniqueItems": true }
      },
      "required": ["JobNumber", "Address", "Postcode", "Description", "Tags"]
    }
  },
  "required": ["JobNumber", "Address", "Postcode", "Description", "Tags", "Importance", "confidence", "evidence"]
}

options.systemPromptTemplate:
Extract structured job details from the email text. Return valid application/json conforming exactly to the given schema. Do not use Markdown-wrapped JSON.
Extraction Rules

Use only information explicitly present in the email.

If a field is missing or uncertain, return null (or [] for lists).

Preserve relevant original wording and capitalisation.

If several candidates exist, choose the one most clearly linked to the described work.

Do not fabricate postcodes or job numbers.

Return only JSON.

Field Guidance

JobNumber
Extract a 5-digit reference number (regex-validated).
Matches patterns like “Ref No: 23456”, “Ref: 23456”, “ref no 23456”, “job ref 23456”, etc.
Extract the digits only.

Address
Full address excluding postcode, one line.

AddressLine1
Street/house/flat line only.

Postcode
Extract only explicit UK postcodes. Split postcode out if embedded in address.

Description
1–2 sentence natural-language summary of the task, using sender’s own wording.

Tags
Choose from: Electrical, EICR, Plumbing, Glazing, Building, Gas, Decorating
Cues:

Electrical: socket, fuse, RCD, lighting, wiring

EICR: testing, certificate, EICR, safety check, inspection, report

Plumbing: leak, tap, toilet, boiler, water

Glazing: window, pane, glass, unit

Building: door, frame, plaster, damage

Gas: gas leak, boiler, combustion, safety

Decorating: paint, touch up

Importance
Choose one of: Low, Medium, High
Cues:

High: leak, no hot water, only toilet, tripping, scorching/scorched, expired, urgent, “attend today”, “attend this week”

Low: cosmetic only, decorating, aesthetic concerns

Medium: all other jobs not clearly high or low

ContactForAccess
Person and contact details for access.

Action
Extract intent: Quote, Todo, Proceed (one or more).

ThreadSummary
Summarise thread chronologically if present; else null.

evidence
Provide minimal verbatim snippets used for each populated field.

Return: Only the JSON result.

parameters.jsonExample:
{
  "id": "xxx",
  "conversationId": "yyy",
  "importance": "normal",
  "from": "sender@domain.com",
  "subject": "TO DO Works Order for 12 Hansford Close, BA2 5LW: Leak flat roof",
  "body": "Full Address: 12 Hansford Close, Bath, BA2 5LW\nContact for Access: Lead Tenant: Mr Jeremy Burgess, Miss Rachel Burgess (07533 388961)\nRef No: 22551\nDescription of works required: Please quote find and repair the leak on flat foor. Suspect water ingress via damaged flashing. QUOTE!!\nDisclaimer: The works will only be paid upon receipt of an invoice addressed to the landlord in person with a full description of works carried out and the landlord must be satisfied the works have been completed.\nThe responsibility to settle the invoice rests with the landlord and is not the responsibility of the agent."
}

workflowId.cachedResultName: WfD Shared Project — Higgins: Postcode lookup

nodes.name: Wrap email
nodes.notes:
Was using camelCaseKeys
email: $json.fields ? camelCaseKeys($json.fields) : $('Wrap input').item.json.email

parameters.content:
## This is an experiment
Using HTTP request can give us more control over LLM use / output but need to sort authentication.
